title: Remove "Lava Chicken" Music Disc
description: Simply replaces the "Lava Chicken" music disc added in 1.21.7 with complete silence, changes the icon and name to "Broken Music Disc".
body:
- Changes the icon of the disc to a broken version
- Changes the name to "Broken Music Disc"
- Changes the artist-song title to "Silence"

**This pack may help reduce your chances of getting DMCA claimed due to the nature of this music disc being a remix of a song from the movie, some people have reported being claimed already in YouTube videos showing off the disc.**

I made this as kind of a joke for a Discord server, but figured some people would actually want it so I might as well just upload it here for anyone to use.

(No hate to Hyper Potions, the song just really does not fit Minecraft in my opinion, and will probably age really poorly after the popularity of Minecraft Movie memes dies out 🤷‍♂️)
